title: MC-258859
description: Improves visuals of Snowy Slopes, Frozen Peaks, Jagged Peaks, Terralith & more by fixing what Minecraft classifies as a 'slope'
body:
# [MC-258859](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-258859)
**Fixes [steep surface rule condition](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Surface_rule#Surface_conditions:~:text=steep) only working on the north and east faces of slopes.**

![A comparison between MC-258859 (referred to as "Fixed" in the image) and Vanilla, where a lot more Stone can be seen on Snowy Peaks and even an increase in Packed Ice for Frozen Peaks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gzfqBTYf/images/710a936314e3e5e3056611cb593c9fac6128b952.gif)


# ✅ Features
- **Makes cliffs prettier** by decreasing the amount of Snow and Dirt in Minecraft's mountain biomes.
 - **Supports Terralith**, where it improves [17 biomes](# "As of 08/2024: Bryce Canyon, Snowy Cherry Grove, Ice Spikes, Icy Spires, Jungle, Yellowstone, Rocky Mountains, Amethyst Rainforest, Amethyst Canyon, Alpine Highlands, Blooming Valley, Highlands, Forested Highlands, Shield, Lush Valley, Valley Clearing, Shield Clearing")!
- **Server-side**, works out of the box with no client incompatibilities!
